hypothesis: If a small LLM is continually pre-trained on MOF-focused literature and large chemical structure corpora before supervised fine-tuning on MOFid–property pairs, then it will achieve lower MAE on MOF band gap and gas adsorption predictions than baseline models even with limited fine-tuning data because domain-specific pretraining imparts transferable structure–property knowledge from textual/SMILES representations that enables accurate inference without 3D structures.
